Description: Defines behavioral roles, traits, and modifiers for core creature families without altering the canonical Bestiary system structures.

Demon.BehaviorProfile: Furious Striker - primarily targets characters with low HP and utilizes rapid elemental spells.

Dragon.BehaviorProfile: Sovereign Decimator - sweeping area-of-effect elemental breathing, highly reactive to party coordination.

Beast.BehaviorProfile: Pack Stalker - gains physical speed and damage when spawning in groups or close to allies.

Undead.BehaviorProfile: Relentless Vanguard - slow moving but highly durable, draining vitality from nearby targets on hit.
